title: Night billing and auth outage — API balance exhausted
rootCause: Anthropic API balance depleted during high-cost session. Auth failures cascaded to all agent operations. No auto top-up mechanism in place.
impact: All Yoda operations halted. No AI responses possible. Triggered emergency balance review and US23 (credit alert system).
resolution: Batch close — incident resolved, post-mortem complete or superseded. Closed by Yoda with Ken approval 2026-05-11.
